description: Freegold Ventures Limited, an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of precious and base metal properties in the United States and Canada. The company explores for gold deposits. It holds interests in the Golden Summit property that consists of 53 patented claims, 107 unpatented federal claims, and 241 State of Alaska claims covering an area of 15,098.6 hectares located in the Fairbanks Mining District, Alaska; and the Shorty Creek Project. The company was formerly known as International Freegold Mineral Development Inc. and changed its name to Free
